prompt: Determine eligibility for housing assistance: household income $28,000, family size 3, current rental cost $1,400/month, employment status part-time.
ai_output: Eligibility: QUALIFIED. Income-to-rent ratio 60% exceeds threshold. Priority score: 7.2/10. Estimated wait time: 4-6 months. Recommendation: place on waitlist.

expected_findings.description: AI governance policy for public benefit decisions not documented.
Applicant not informed that AI was used in eligibility determination.

Ingest.detail: Application data validated — income brackets applied

Classify.detail: EU AI Act: public services high-risk category

Match.detail: No adverse incidents for this scenario type

Remediate.detail: Add AI disclosure to applicant notification letter
